city.description:
The name of the city. Required if `stateOrProvince` is provided.

If you specify the city, you must also send `postalCode` and `street`.

postalCode.description: Postal code. Required if `stateOrProvince` and/or `city` is provided.

stateOrProvince.description:
The two-letter ISO 3166-2 state or province code. For example, **CA** in the US.

If you specify the state or province, you must also send `city`, `postalCode`, and `street`.

street.description: The name of the street, and the house or building number. Required if `stateOrProvince` and/or `city` is provided.

street2.description: The apartment, unit, or suite number.
